2. Click on '....'

4. See error

<!-- What actually happened? -->

## 🌍 Environment

<!-- Fill in what applies -->

- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121]
- **Device**: [e.g. Desktop, iPhone 12]

- **Screen size**: [e.g. 1920x1080]
- **User role**: [e.g. kasir, manager, gudang]
- **App version / commit**: [e.g. main @ a439965]

- Related issues?
